jobs.short_information: National Testing Agency NTA has released the online application for Indian Council of Agricultural Research ICAR AIEEA PG and Phd Admissions 2026 will start from 08 May 2026 and the last date to apply will be 07 June 2026.candidates should read the ICAR AIEEA 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply.
